included_primary_ids: string work item id; sorted lexicographically; primary records only
overdue_primary_ids: string work item id; sorted lexicographically; subset of included_primary_ids

team_overdue_counts.team: Core Services or Platform Core; teams listed alphabetically
team_overdue_counts.overdue_count: integer count of overdue primary records

top_hotspot.team: team name for the owner/team pair with the most overdue primary records
top_hotspot.owner: owner name, or UNASSIGNED when owner is missing

duplicate_clusters.primary_id: primary work item id referenced by duplicates; clusters sorted by primary_id
duplicate_ids: duplicate work item id; sorted lexicographically

missing_owner_ids: string work item id; sorted lexicographically; primary included records with no owner
breach_rate: number rounded to exactly 3 decimal places; overdue primary count divided by included primary count
